---
title: "First Day at Apple"
description: "Starting a new position as Principal Scientist, Knowledge Platform at Apple (Seattle)."
author: synesis
date: "2022-09-13"
categories: [knowledge graphs, AI, deep learning, machine learning, conversational AI, program synthesis, photo, personal, seattle]
image: first-day-apple.jpg
---

![](first-day-apple.jpg)

I'm happy to share that I'm starting a new position as Principal Scientist, Knowledge Platform at Apple (Seattle)!

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_firstday-knowledgegraph-nlgpu-activity-6975297349053034496-7XrV).*
